## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, domain migration, and image handling for Abnormal Security's SEO efforts with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calibration articles shared; feedback requested to inform future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Domain migration from abnormalsecurity.com to abnormal.ai on April 16th; SEO impact mitigation needed](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Image handling process to be clarified with Emily; balance needed between visible and hidden blog content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Content strategy to focus on high-value topics while leveraging hidden blogs for SEO-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Feedback

  - [Two calibration articles shared for review](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Feedback crucial for refining content strategy and voice](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Plan to ramp up to 5 additional articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Aim to balance new content creation with refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

### Domain Migration

  - [Changing from abnormalsecurity.com to abnormal.ai on April 16th](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Concerns about potential SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide recommendations for mitigating risks](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Expectation of possible volatility in the first 6 days post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Image Handling Process

  - [Design team has templates, but currently focused on website relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Emily to be consulted for current process and potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Possibility of using AI-generated images to be explored post-RSA conference](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Potential for automating image creation using existing iconography library](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [Balance between visible and hidden blog content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [25-50% of new content to be published normally on the main blog](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Hidden blogs to be used for SEO-focused content that may not align with core messaging](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Exploration of non-blog, non-glossary content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Removal of irrelevant competitors (e.g., MailTrap) from content inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Focus on AI-related security competitors like Darktrace](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Inclusion of KnowBe4 for security awareness training content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### AI-Focused Content

  - [Emphasis on behavioral AI and human vulnerability topics](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Exploration of highly personalized, AI-driven attack scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Potential for creating a content pillar around human-centric security threats](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and provide feedback on calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare recommendations for domain migration SEO impact mitigation](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Emily to discuss image handling process](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Begin work on next set of 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Explore options for balancing visible and hidden blog content](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Continue refining competitor list and content inspiration sources](https://fathom.video/share/yJZfbPLNEUgcALP9tycXYPPhsyoKWQj_?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
